task_text: Open project_helios_status.txt and reformat it so that each section has a bold heading, bullet points replace any run-on paragraphs, and the file is saved back in place. Do not change any of the factual content.

content.text: Let me start by reading the file to understand its current structure.

content.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text:
Hmm, this file is actually quite well-structured already with bullet points and clear sections. Let me look more carefully — the **Open Blockers** section uses run-on paragraph-style entries (two sentences per numbered item strung together) rather than clean bullet points, and none of the section headings are bolded. I'll reformat it so that:

1. All section headings are wrapped in `**bold**` markers.
2. Each blocker's details are broken into sub-bullets instead of run-on sentences.

input.content:
Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

**Overall:** ON TRACK (minor risks)

**Milestone Progress:**
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

**Sprint 14 Goals:**
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

**Open Blockers:**
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   - Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT.
   - Estimated delay: 2–3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   - Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

**Next Milestone:** Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text:
Done! Here's a summary of every change made — strictly formatting, zero factual edits:

| Section | Change |
|---|---|
| **Overall** | Heading bolded |
| **Milestone Progress** | Heading bolded |
| **Sprint 14 Goals** | Heading bolded |
| **Open Blockers** | Heading bolded; each blocker's run-on sentences split into sub-bullets (`- Dev team awaiting…` / `- Estimated delay:` / `- Target resolution:`) |
| **Next Milestone** | Heading bolded (also corrected capitalisation to match the rest) |

All original facts, dates, percentages, names, and statuses are preserved exactly as they were.
